'''√s-j-p''' ('''kasajap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mag|mag]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-j-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mag|mag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √s-j-p
|-
! Lemma
| kasajap
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thisajap || jisajap || shisajap || kisajap
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthusajap || jujusajap || shushusajap || kukusajap
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thusajap || jusajap || shusajap || kusajap
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thusajap || jusajap || shusajap || kusajap
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thesajap || jesajap || shesajap || kesajap
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothosajap || jojosajap || shoshosajap || kokosajap
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thosajap || josajap || shosajap || kosajap
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thosajap || josajap || shosajap || kosajap
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || sajap || sajap || sajap || sajap
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || sajap || sajap || sajap || sajap
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || sajap || sajap || sajap || sajap
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || sajap || sajap || sajap || sajap
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæsajap || jæsajap || shæsajap || kæsajap
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathasajap || jajasajap || shashasajap || kakasajap
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thasajap || jasajap || shasajap || kasajap
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thasajap || jasajap || shasajap || kasajap
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shasajap
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshasajap
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishasajap
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shasajapnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshasajapnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishasajapnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shasajapshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshasajapnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishasajapshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shasajapro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshasajapnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishasajapro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shasajapmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshasajapnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishasajapmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shasajapsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshasajapnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishasajapsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shasajapng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshasajapnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishasajapng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shasajapya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshasajapnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishasajapya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shasajapyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshasajapnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishasajapyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shasajapnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshasajapnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishasajapnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shasajapnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasajapnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasajapnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shasajapnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshasajapnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasajapnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shasajapshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshasajapnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishasajapshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shasajapshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasajapnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasajapshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shasajapshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshasajapnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasajapshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shasajapronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshasajapnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishasajapronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shasajaproshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshasajapnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishasajaproshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shasajapromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshasajapnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasajapromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shasajapmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshasajapnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishasajapmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shasajapmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshasajapnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishasajapmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shasajapmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasajapnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasajapmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
